title: Craftable Horse Armor
description: Adds crafting recipes for all types of horse armor based on the leather horse armor recipe
body:
[![Requires Fabric API](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_64h.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
[![Requires Quilted Fabric API](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/requires/quilted-fabric-api_64h.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl)

![Craftable Horse Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27687652bacfe37cbc273be866be29f582014321.png)

This mod/datapack adds recipes for all types of horse armor, using the leather horse armor as a template.

## Recipes
![You can craft leather, iron, gold, and diamond horse armor using 7 leather, iron ingots, gold ingots, and diamonds respectively.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f73ed3c56076ea4d759f4e0cafbb445e4faca67f.gif)

Check out my other mods [here](https://modrinth.com/user/Sumbaii999).
